info.title: Loan Rates API
info.description: Returns current loan interest rates by product type. Use this API to retrieve rates for auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, and HELOC products.

get.description: Returns current loan interest rates for all product types including auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, and HELOC. Use this when a customer asks about loan rates, interest rates, or financing options.

200.description: Successful response with current loan rates

rates.description: List of loan rate products with their current APR ranges

productType.description: The type of loan product (e.g., Auto Loan - New, 30-Year Fixed Mortgage)

term.description: The loan term length (e.g., 36 months, 360 months, Variable)

minRate.description: The minimum APR offered for this product

maxRate.description: The maximum APR offered for this product

asOfDate.description: The date these rates are effective as of

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of when rates were last updated
